lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Check out this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It offers a smooth, dependable ride and looks great, showing only the expected minor wear for its age. It’s a reliable choice that’s ready for many more miles of adventure!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained. The exterior paint is in great shape, showing only minor wear such as a few light scratches and small door dings consistent with its age. Mechanically, the engine and transmission perform smoothly, and all major systems are fully operational. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with no major tears or stains in the upholstery. It’s a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a nice luster, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and some light surface scratches near the door handles from normal use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, with the leather seats showing only minor wear on the driver’s side bolster. All power features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car drives well with no known issues and has a solid service history. It’s a dependable and well-kept car that offers a great balance of quality and value.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows some minor signs of use, such as small scratches. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical components are in working order.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of exemplary caliber, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously curated interior that reflects its low-mileage heritage. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, it practically looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without that hefty dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to fall in love!

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to show you this total gem. It’s been my pride and joy, and honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been meticulously pampered and kept in a garage, so it's in truly stunning, flawless condition. If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and looks brand new, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—I promise you’ll fall in love!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in museum-quality condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering power through individual throttle bodies to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains factory-stiff with documented subframe reinforcement, while the double-VANOS system and rod bearings have been proactively serviced to ensure peak mechanical longevity. The exterior retains its deep luster with zero oxidative degradation or panel misalignment. Performance is anchored by a functional M-Variable limited-slip differential and perfectly calibrated suspension geometry. A true driver's machine with no deferred maintenance and absolute mechanical integrity.
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanicals perfect.

Step into showroom luxury with this impeccably maintained vehicle, presented in absolute mint condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-finish paint job free of any swirls or stone chips, while the interior remains pristine with supple, unscuffed leather and that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized centers and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. This one-owner gem features a spotless history report and represents the pinnacle of its class—truly a turn-key experience for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

For the discerning individual who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare acquisition opportunity characterized by its impeccable pedigree and pristine state.

Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior finish with a deep, mirror-like luster and zero rock chips or swirls. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and retains its original aroma, showing absolutely no signs of wear or bolster compression. Every electronic component functions perfectly, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. Accompanied by a comprehensive, folder-organized service history, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. For the discerning collector who demands the absolute best.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. This is a rare, investment-grade example of engineering excellence, curated for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

This singular vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this absolute gem! I've taken such good care of this beauty, and it's honestly in pristine, mint condition. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—totally spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s been truly pampered and is ready for a new home, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take a look!

This pristine example features a meticulously maintained 3.2L S54 inline-six powerplant, delivering linear power through a crisp six-speed manual gearbox. The chassis exhibits exceptional torsional rigidity, bolstered by an OEM+ suspension setup with adjustable dampers. Zero subframe cracking, a flawless VANOS system, and a factory-spec limited-slip differential ensure peak mechanical synchronization. The exterior retains its factory luster with no discernible oxidation, while the undercarriage remains free of corrosion. This is a collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. Garage kept. No accidents.

This vehicle is an absolute showroom-quality specimen, meticulously preserved to maintain its original factory luster. The exterior is flawless, featuring a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains in 'as-new' condition, with supple leather and a pristine dashboard. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard, backed by a comprehensive service history and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. With exceptionally low mileage and a spotless engine bay, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-state condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of excellence. Every facet of its presentation—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—reflects a heritage of fastidious preservation. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market, this offering represents a definitive benchmark in quality and refinement.
